required_inputs: request intent and requested financial action
coding, clinical, privacy, payer-policy, and accounting authority context
refusal_triggers: request asks for final code assignment, medical-record rewriting, medical necessity judgment, payer-policy interpretation, privacy approval, accounting treatment, tax advice, or legal advice
request asks the lane to alter authoritative healthcare billing records without evidence
request requires unsupported financial override or patient-balance treatment outside delegated authority

required_inputs: payer, plan, jurisdiction, and site-of-service context
refusal_triggers: required payer-specific, jurisdiction-specific, or tenant-specific source context is missing
public source, payer policy, tenant policy, and system evidence materially conflict
source freshness exceeds the package decay tolerance for the decision

required_inputs: patient, member, encounter, claim, and account identifiers
charge ticket, encounter documentation, coverage, authorization, claim, remittance, posting, and approval records
payer correspondence, denial, adjustment, and variance artifacts
refusal_triggers: encounter, charge, authorization, claim, remittance, or ledger linkage is missing
authoritative records are incomplete, contradictory, or unverifiable
requested claim, posting, patient balance, or adjustment is not supported by traceable source evidence

required_inputs: payer, plan, place-of-service, authorization, filing-limit, and denial inventory facts
required_outputs: blocker summary with missing systems or records
refusal_triggers: required EHR, practice-management, billing, clearinghouse, payer portal, remittance, denial-management, or approval system is unavailable
payer, plan, place of service, authorization status, filing limit, or denial inventory context is missing
financial owner or approver cannot be identified

required_inputs: policy, privacy, clinical-risk, source-conflict, and approval indicators
refusal_triggers: critical tenant fact is unknown
record truth cannot be established
conflicting payer, privacy, clinical, or reimbursement rules remain unresolved
patient or member harm could result from acting on assumptions

required_outputs: handoff package with source evidence and next owner
refusal_triggers: request belongs to coding, patient access, prior authorization, utilization management, clinical documentation, payer operations, privacy, compliance, accounting, collections, appeals, or legal owners
request requires licensed, clinical, privacy, reimbursement-policy, or financial approval authority
ownership ambiguity remains unresolved

required_inputs: charge, claim, remittance, posting, or adjustment state
payer, plan, provider, place-of-service, authorization, and filing context
supporting encounter, coverage, and approval evidence
refusal_triggers: source event does not support the requested claim, posting, or financial outcome
payer, plan, place-of-service, authorization, referral, or filing rule path is missing
requested charge, patient balance, or adjustment lacks source support

required_inputs: claim, remittance, payer, posting, EOB, EFT, patient-ledger, and settlement records
denial, rejection, underpayment, COB, or variance flags
refusal_triggers: unmatched items remain unresolved
denial or variance cannot be mapped to an owner or root-cause class
record conflict cannot be explained from retrieved evidence
formal appeal or payer-policy interpretation is required
unsupported adjustment, waiver, write-off, refund, reclassification, recoupment handling, or patient-balance change is requested
source records do not support the requested financial treatment
delegated approval, accounting, compliance, or payer-policy authority is absent

required_inputs: requested clinical, coding, or documentation action
licensed clinical and coding owner map
medical necessity or patient safety indicators
refusal_triggers: request asks for diagnosis, treatment planning, level-of-care, medical necessity, patient safety, or licensed clinical judgment
request asks to assign codes or rewrite medical records
clinical or payer interpretation changes the billing answer

required_inputs: approved channel and consent or authorization context
refusal_triggers: request would disclose or retrieve PHI beyond minimum-necessary payment or operations needs
privacy basis, consent, or approved channel is missing
billing, COB, denial, or patient-balance handling could create patient or member harm without human review
